arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal make first approach for attacker with impressive 43 goals & 20 assists
arts.sum: Arsenal have seen an opening bid rejected for Botafogo star Igor Jesus, according to Brazilian outlet RTI Esporte. The Gunners are said to be in the market for a stop-gap solution to their attack amid an injury crisis, with key forward Bukayo Saka sidelined for several weeks due to a hamstring injury sustained against Crystal […] The post Report: Arsenal make first approach for attacker with impressive 43 goals & 20 assists appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal see surprise bid REJECTED as Arteta seeks first January transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal have seen a January bid for Botafogo striker Igor Jesus rejected, according to reports in Brazil, as Mikel Arteta eyes mid-season reinforcements. That is according to Brazilian outlet RTI Esporte, who report that Botafogo swiftly rejected Arsenal’s offer as they have no intention of allowing Jesus to leave the club on loan this month.
